explanations.4: This hardcodes the SQL Server login username as 'SA' (the system administrator account) into the code, which is a security risk because anyone reading the code can see it.
explanations.6: This hardcodes the database password directly in the source code, which is a major security vulnerability—passwords should never be stored in plain text in files.
explanations.12: This calls a custom method that runs a SQL query and pastes all results starting at cell A1 in the currently active worksheet.
